recommendations.title: Hulk Vs.
recommendations.genres: Science Fiction, Animation, Action, Adventure, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: Two stories featuring Marvel's anti-hero The Incredible Hulk and his encounters with the X-Man Wolverine and the god known as Thor.

recommendations.genres: Animation, Action, Science Fiction, Adventure, Fantasy

recommendations.title: Incredibles 2
recommendations.overview: Elastigirl springs into action to save the day, while Mr. Incredible faces his greatest challenge yet – taking care of the problems of his three children.

recommendations.title: Planet Hulk

recommendations.title: The Incredible Hulk Returns
recommendations.overview: Years after the end of the original series, David Banner continues his wandering search for a cure for the condition that turns him into the Hulk. He reunites with former colleague Don Blake, unaware of his mystical connection to Thor. When a crimina

recommendations.title: PAW Patrol: Mighty Pups
recommendations.overview: When their latest scheme goes awry, Mayor Humdinger and his nephew Harold accidentally divert a meteor towards Adventure Bay. The meteor's golden energy grants the PAW Patrol superpowers. The heroic Mighty Pups are on a roll to super-save the day.

recommendations.title: The Incredibles
recommendations.overview: Bob Parr has given up his superhero days to log in time as an insurance adjuster and raise his three children with his formerly heroic wife in suburbia. But when he receives a mysterious assignment, it's time to get back into costume.

recommendations.title: The Book of Life
